scores.correctness_notes: All core content is correct: type field, description, containers/resources linkage, and the key rule about matching names. Misses upstream-source field mentioned in gold standard, but all stated facts are accurate. Extra deployment and publishing sections are legitimate real functionality.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the juju deploy --resource flag, credential file formats, and charmcraft upload-resource command are all real features, not fabricated
